questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The western coast of India is known for which type of ports?
questions.explanation: The correct answer could not be determined from the provided text.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which global chip-design conference, returning to San Francisco in June 2025, for its 62nd edition, announced a GenAI Chip Hackathon?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. DAC announced a GenAI Chip Hackathon.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: At the time of independence, which sector contributed the largest share to India's national income?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. Agriculture contributed the largest share to India's national income.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: What is the primary aim of the 'Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana'?
options: Providing mobile phones to rural households
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. PM Ujjwala Yojana provides LPG connections to women.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: During the colonial period in India, which social reformer worked for widow remarriage and against child marriage in Bengal?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Ishwar Chandra Vidyasagar worked for widow remarriage and against child marriage.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following is a synthetic polymer used in making fabrics?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. Nylon 6,6 is a synthetic polymer used in making fabrics.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Who became the first athlete to break a national record at the Khelo India Para Games 2025 by lifting 101 kg in the 45 kg category powerlifting in March 2025?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Khushboo Gill broke the national record at Khelo India Para Games 2025.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.subTopic: Prime Minister Chief Minister Council of Ministers
questions.question: Who was the Union Home Minister of India as of June 2025, following the general elections?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Amit Shah was the Union Home Minister as of June 2025.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: A significant river of the Indian Desert, Luni originates from western slopes of the Aravalli ranges near which place in Rajasthan?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The Luni river originates near Sirohi in Rajasthan.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which stone was mainly utilised in building the Chennakeshava Temple in Belur, India?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Soapstone was mainly utilised in building the Chennakeshava Temple.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following regional film industries is based in Chennai and produces movies in the Tamil language?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Kollywood is based in Chennai and produces Tamil movies.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following allows users to delete a file using the mouse?
options: Drag it to the Recycle Bin
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. Dragging a file to the Recycle Bin deletes it using the mouse.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following Parliamentary Committees of India is considered a 'Financial Committee'?
options: Committee on Welfare of SCs and STs
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The Estimates Committee is considered a Financial Committee.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The partition of Bengal in 1905 was announced during the tenure of which Viceroy?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Lord Curzon announced the partition of Bengal in 1905.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which 18th-century revolt was led by Raja Chait Singh against British interference in the Benares region in 1781?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The Benares Revolt was led by Raja Chait Singh in 1781.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic feature of subsistence farming?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Subsistence farming is done for family consumption.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following was the official theme for World Meteorological Day celebrated on 23 March 2025?
options: Closing the Early Warning Gap Together
Investing in Weather and Climate Services
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The theme was 'Closing the Early Warning Gap Together'.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The Nizam of Hyderabad accepted British subsidiary alliance under
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The Nizam accepted subsidiary alliance under Lord Wellesley.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: In which border areas did India and China agree on patrolling arrangements along the Line of Actual Control on 21 October 2024?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. India and China agreed on patrolling arrangements at Depsang and Demchok.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which Indian state hosted the 38th edition of the National Games in early 2025?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Uttarakhand hosted the 38th National Games.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: If an object moves up to four times faster than the speed of sound, the condition is called:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. Moving up to four times faster than sound is hypersonic.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The Farazi Movement, led by Haji Shariatullah, focused on religious purification and resisting the British in which region?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The Farazi Movement was based in Bengal.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: In 2025, the Federation of Indian Associations (FIA) elected Hemant Patel as President for the 2025-2026 term. Where is this organisation based?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. FIA is based in Chicago, USA.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: According to the Brønsted-Lowry theory, which of the following defines an acid?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. An acid is a proton donor according to Brønsted-Lowry theory.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The Convention on Biological Diversity (CBD) was a result of which global conference?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The CBD was a result of the Earth Summit in 1992.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: In 2025, what does the abbreviation NGLV stand for in ISRO's latest rocket programme?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. NGLV stands for Next Generation Launch Vehicle.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: In May 2025, ISRO's Aditya-L1 mission released its first set of scientific data. What is the primary objective of this mission?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Aditya-L1 aims to observe the Sun's outermost layer.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which type of memory loses all its stored data when the power is turned off?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. RAM loses its data when power is turned off.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: What is the main reason behind the formation of lagoons along the Eastern Coastal Plains?
options: Sand deposition along the shallow coastlines
Tectonic activity and fault line shifts
Coral reef development and volcanic islands
Deposition by rivers and wave action along the coast
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Lagoons form due to sand deposition along shallow coastlines.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following was the most famous female scholar in ancient India?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Gargi was the most famous female scholar in ancient India.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following is INCORRECT about the Harappans?
options: The most favoured ornaments were beads of carnelian.
They exported ornaments, timber, some objects of daily use.
The Harappans were engaged in active trade.
The Harappans used only gold to make tools, pots and pans.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. Harappans did not use only gold for tools and pots.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following is a shallow desert depression formed by wind erosion?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. A deflation hollow is a shallow desert depression formed by wind erosion.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Privatisation aims to improve in public enterprises.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Privatisation aims to improve operational efficiency and competitiveness.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: The Rihand Hydroelectric Project is located in which district of Uttar Pradesh?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The Rihand Hydroelectric Project is in Sonebhadra district.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following communities may apply for Indian citizenship after just 6 years of residence, as per the Citizenship (Amendment) Act, 2019?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. Sikhs from Pakistan may apply for citizenship after 6 years under CAA 2019.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which city hosted the opening ceremony of the 2025 National Games?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. Dehradun hosted the opening ceremony of the 2025 National Games.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: President Murmu went to which country in April 2025 to represent India at the funeral of Pope Francis?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. President Murmu went to Vatican City.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Under the Constitution of India, which of the following is NOT a subject under the State List?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. Airports are not under the State List.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the estimation of India's national and per capita income during the colonial rule is correct?
options: The colonial government never made any sincere attempt to estimate India's national and per capita income.
The colonial government estimated India's national and per capita income sincerely every year.
The colonial government estimated India's per capita income but ignored national income.
The colonial government estimated India's national income but ignored per capita income.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The colonial government never sincerely estimated India's national and per capita income.

questions.subject: General Awareness
questions.question: Under which of the following conditions is a Tribal Advisory Council (TAC) established in a State?
options: If the State has any forest area
If there is at least one Scheduled Tribe
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. A TAC is established when the tribal population exceeds 10 percent.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The sum of two numbers is 57 and their L.C.M. is 812. What are the two numbers?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The numbers are 28 and 29.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The greatest number that divides 131, 91, and 215, leaving remainders 8, 9, and 10 respectively, is:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The greatest number is 41.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: By selling an article at 2/5 of its actual selling price, Nibhay incurs a loss of 26%. If he sells it at 84% of its actual selling price, then the profit percentage is:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The profit percentage is 55.4 percent.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A man goes to Nagpur from Visakhapatnam at a speed of 55 km/hr and returns to Visakhapatnam at speed of 66 km/hr, through the same route. What is his average speed (in km/hr) of the entire journey?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The average speed is 60 km/hr.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The LCM of two numbers is 168 and their HCF is 12. If one of the numbers is 36, find the other number.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The other number is 198.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Given that 58^0.5 = x, 58^0.79 = y and x^2 = y^z, then the value of z is close to:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The value of z is close to 18.48.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Pallavi bought a toy for 740, decorated it at a cost of 16 and sold the toy for 558. Find the loss or profit percentage.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Pallavi incurred a loss of 550 percent.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A number when increased by 80% gives 2790. The number is:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The number is 1550.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Rahul buys a box of pens (listed price of 900) with a trade discount of 30%. What is the net price?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The net price is 630.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A cylindrical rod has an outer curved surface area of 3300 cm^2. If the length of the rod is 72 cm, then the outer radius (in cm) of the rod, correct to two places of decimal, is: Take Pi = 22/7
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The outer radius is 7.29 cm.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Which of the following numbers divides 4,81,355?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. 4,81,355 is divisible by 5.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The average of 17 numbers is 15. If the average of the first 9 numbers is 14 and the average of the last 8 numbers is 16, find the 9th number.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The 9th number is 120.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A shopkeeper marked the price of a table as 1,400 and offered two successive discounts, one of which is 12%. If a customer pays 1,133.44 for the table, then what was the second discount percentage offered?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The second discount percentage is 8 percent.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Find the value of sin(90 - x) cos(180 - (x - y)) + cos(90 - x) sin(180 - (y - x))
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The value is sin y.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: If the third proportional of 81 and 27 is x, then what is the value of x?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The value of x is 9.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The current population of a town is 12,014. It increases by 25% and 60% in two successive years but decreases by 50% in the third year. What is the population of the town at the end of the third year?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The population at the end of the third year is 12,014.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Evaluate: (-9) - (-60) + (-10) + (-3) x 6
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The value is -36.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Ritik and Sanjay together invested 79,200 in a business. At the end of the year, out of a total profit of 16,500, Sanjay's share was 3,600. What was the difference between their investments?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The difference between their investments is 44,640.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The average weight of Vipul, Mohan and Mohammad is 45 kg. If the average weight of Vipul and Mohan is 43 kg and that of Mohan and Mohammad is 50 kg, then the weight of Mohan (in kg) is:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The weight of Mohan is 61 kg.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A train with a length of 195 m overtakes a man moving at a speed of 5 km/hr (in the same direction) in 13 seconds. How much time (in seconds) will it take this train to completely cross another train that is 255 m long, moving in the opposite direction at a speed of 76 km/hr?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. The time taken is 32 seconds.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Find the simple interest on ₹1,200 at an interest rate of 3% per month for 11 months.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. The simple interest is 396.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: The sum of the squares of two consecutive odd natural numbers is 394. The sum of the numbers is:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option D. The sum of the numbers is 28.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Pipe P can fill 5/7 part of a tank in 30 hours, and pipe Q can fill 2/5 part of the same tank in 28 hours. Both P and Q were kept open for 7 hours, then both were closed. Pipe R alone was then opened and it emptied the water in the tank in 8 hours. Pipes P, Q and R together can fill the empty tank in:
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option B. They can fill the tank together in 204 hours.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: A can do a work in 10 days and B can do the same work in 20 days. If they work on it together for 6 days, then what fraction of the work is left?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The fraction of work left is 1/10.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.question: Seven times the present age of P exceeds the present age of Q by 46 years. After 8 years, six times Q's age will be 24 years less than six times P's age at that time. What is the present age (in years) of Q?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. The present age of Q is 11 years.

questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.subject: General Intelligence and Reasoning

You have to decide which conclusion(s) logically follow(s) from the given statements. Statements: Some nuts are berries. All fruits are berries. Conclusions (I): Some nuts are fruits. Conclusions (II): All berries are fruits.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option C. Neither conclusion follows from the statements.

questions.subject: General Intelligence and Reasoning
questions.question: Binoy starts from Point Y and drives 16 km towards the north. He then takes a right turn and drives 43 km, then turns right and drives 38 km. He then takes a right turn and drives 19 km. He takes a final right turn, drives 22 km and stops at Point Z. How far (shortest distance) and in which direction should he drive in order to reach Point Y again? (All turns are 90-degree turns only unless specified.)
questions.explanation: The correct answer is Option A. Binoy should drive 31 km towards the south.
